## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Checks

- [ ] `npm run verify:backend`
- [ ] `npm run verify:frontend`
- [ ] Manual smoke test done if UI or workflow behavior changed

## Security Impact

- [ ] No auth / permission logic changed
- [ ] Auth / permission logic changed and security regression coverage was updated

## Notes

- Risks, follow-ups, or rollout details
